candidate_check.description: DevTools Generative AI features must be disabled.

check_content_excerpt:
Universal method:
1. In the omnibox (address bar) type "chrome:// policy".
2. If "DevToolsGenAiSettings" is not displayed under the "Policy Name" column or it is not set to "2" under the "Policy Value" column, this is a finding.

Windows method:
1. Start "regedit".
2. Navigate to "HKLM\Software\Policies\Google\Chrome\".
3. If the "DevToolsGenAiSettings" value name does not exist or its value data is not set to "2", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Windows group policy:
1. Open the group policy editor tool with gpedit.msc.
2. Navigate to Policy Path: Computer Configuration\Administrative Templates\Google\Google Chrome\Generative AI
Policy Name: Settings for DevTools Generative AI Features
Policy State: Enabled
Policy Value: Do not allow DevTools Generative AI Features
title: DevTools Generative AI features must be disabled.
